contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: Hit List email tracking, warm-ups, and retailer follow-ups
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1031
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/66
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/67
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/68
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/69
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/44
  
  Details:
  **Time spent:** ~45 minutes (AI-assisted session).
  
  **Scope — retailer sales pipeline (Hit List):** email open/click tracking, warm-up and follow-up Gmail drafts, sheet alignment, and operator tooling.
  
  **What we shipped**
  
  - **Edgar (sentiment_importer):** `GET /email_agent/open.gif` and `GET /email_agent/click` update **Email Agent Drafts** **Open** / **Click through** on the Hit List workbook via `Gdrive::EmailAgentDrafts` (same service-account pattern as newsletter tracking).
  - **go_to_market (market_research):** Python draft scripts gained `--track-clicks`, canonical **Open** / **Click through** columns on new sheet rows, `regenerate_pending_email_agent_draft_tracking.py` to MIME-refresh pending Gmail drafts with tracking, and **`reconcile_email_agent_drafts_stale_sent.py`** to flip **`pending_review` → `sent`** when Gmail already shows **SENT** (plus **discarded** on draft 404). Docs in **`HIT_LIST_CREDENTIALS.md`**.
  - **agentic_ai_context:** **`WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md`** §4 and **`CONTEXT_UPDATES.md`** entry linking Edgar + go_to_market scripts for future assistants.
  
  **GitHub (TrueSightDAO)**
  
  Pull requests (evidence):
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1031
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/66
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/67
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/68
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/69
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/44
  
  **Operator notes**
  
  - Deploy **sentiment_importer** to **edgar.truesight.me** so pixels/clicks hit production.
  - After sends, run **`sync_email_agent_followup.py`**; use **`reconcile_email_agent_drafts_stale_sent.py`** if the Drafts tab lags Gmail.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
